utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully specified: (1) Property includes type, location, accessibility features, price, and viewing schedule; (2) Financing includes cash purchase details, cost, and budget range; (3) Legal services include cost and detailed inclusions; (4) Moving services include cost and service description; (5) Setup services include cost and detailed inclusions; (6) Total budget includes a full cost breakdown and timeline. Therefore, all six required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution includes two 2-bedroom accessible purchase properties in the Burlington area, each priced at CAD $650,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, 'Family House' matches this price and suitability for retirees, so it corresponds to rating 9. For financing, the solution specifies a 'Cash purchase solution', which directly maps to 'Cash Purchase' with a rating of 10. The legal services described as a 'Complete legal services package at CAD $1,950 including property survey, real estate lawyer for closing, title search and insurance' most closely corresponds to the 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9) and includes a property survey, which matches 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 10). The moving services are 'Professional moving services at CAD $850 specialized for senior downsizing', which aligns with 'Standard Moving' (rating 7), since the premium moving service is more expensive at CAD $1200. The utility setup package at CAD $280 matches 'Premium Utilities' with a rating of 9.
